description_long: This object resembles a stylized duck with exaggerated, angular wings and a slender, elongated body. The wings are dramatically extended outward, giving the impression of motion or flight, and are rendered in a metallic gold-brown color. The head is small and rounded, with a short beak and two prominent, dark circular eyes. The body and tail are covered in a white, feathery texture, contrasting sharply with the smooth, reflective wings and legs. The legs are thin and elongated, ending in webbed feet, and the overall form is abstract and geometric. The duck's posture suggests it is in mid-flight or about to take off, with its wings raised and body angled forward.
description: A stylized, angular duck with metallic gold-brown wings and a white feathery body, depicted in a dynamic, flight-like pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the duck's head, beak, and both wings extended outward, with the feathery body visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dramatic extension of the wings and the elongated body, with the head and beak pointing forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the feathery body and the symmetrical spread of the wings, with the legs and feet visible below.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizes the geometric structure of the wings and the curvature of the body, with the head partially obscured.
